events.name: エンディング分岐イベ

parameters: "I am the one who rules this world..."

"I've been waiting for a long time... for 'players'
like you."

"Now, defeat me...! If you do, I'll grant any wish you
desire..."
Here they come...! Be careful, Mother!
Whether you're a devil or a god, bring it on!

Magician Craft: Ah... I forgot to introduce myself. I
am a magician named Craft.

Magician Craft: To be precise, I am a magical creature
created by Craft to manage this island. However, since
my personality is a direct copy, please just call me
Craft.

Huh...!? Don't tell me this is one of those 'it was
all a game world' scenarios!?

Magician Craft: No, it's not virtual reality. It's an
actual isolated island that was magically modified
into a training ground. Its name is "Hero Training
Island ver1.02".

Magician Craft: There was a malfunction in the magic
managing the island, causing it to run amok for a long
time without anyone being able to intervene. But
defeating the final boss, the Virtual Demon King,
stopped its operation.

So... does that mean we're in a different place from
the world we originally lived in?

Magician Craft: Same Earth... but it's a parallel
universe, a different world.

Magician Craft: I don't know why you, residents of
another world, were summoned as players... There are
signs that someone interfered...

Magician Craft: However, it's not uncommon for people
from other worlds to transfer here, so it's possible
to send you back to your original world.
We can go back to our original world...!!

Magician Craft: As a reward for clearing the game, how
about choosing between "Ownership of this isolated
island" or "Returning to your original world"?

Hmm... (Should I live here with mom... or go back to
the original world...)
\V[3], what do you want to do...? You choose.
Mom... I think I want to stay in this world...
I want to stay with you forever in this world!

I too... don't care where as long as I can be with
\V[3]...\i[12]

Magician Craft: I see... Understood. Then, I will
transfer the highest administrator rights to you.

Magician Craft: ...The transfer is complete. Now, you
are the owners of this island.

Magician Craft: I will continue to handle the
maintenance of this island, so please feel free to
live as you wish.
Then, let's go back to our home!

*If conditions are met, you can now propose to Risa
under the legendary tree.

\c[21]*The ending will begin, and then return to the
title. Are you sure?\c[0]
Magician Craft: That wish... Understood! Then...!

Magician Craft: Hello, there's nothing special here...
Would you like to return to the base (shore)?

I sense an incredibly powerful enemy from deep
within... This seems like it'll be our final battle.
I can't stop trembling in fear... If we lose...

I felt courage well up inside me after a high-five
with Mom!

Party fully recovered! Party's maximum attack power
increased by +10!
